ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "playing_role" TEXT /* Playing role (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., right-hand, left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "player_profile" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional biographical information */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground where the team plays */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a single innings */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries (100+ runs) */,
  "half_centuries" INTEGER /* Number of half-centuries (50-99 runs) */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (runs per 100 balls) */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs per innings */,
  "total_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of balls faced by the player */,
  "total_balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Total number of balls bowled by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "total_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of catches taken by the player */,
  "total_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total number of stumpings taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team A won by 50 runs) */,
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "total_overs" INTEGER /* Total number of overs played in the match */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the match */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total number of wickets taken in the match */,
  "match_stats" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional match statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_1") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_2") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "strikes_played" INTEGER /* Strikes played by the player */,
  "balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Balls bowled by the player */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Extras (e.g., wides, no-balls) */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate (runs per over) */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings taken by the player */,
  "fielding_position" TEXT /* Fielding position of the player */,
  "batting_position" TEXT /* Batting position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the coach's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., player, match) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a single innings */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries (100+ runs) */,
  "half_centuries" INTEGER /* Number of half-centuries (50-99 runs) */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (runs per 100 balls) */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs per innings */,
  "total_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of balls faced by the player */,
  "total_balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Total number of balls bowled by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "total_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of catches taken by the player */,
  "total_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total number of stumpings taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
